content.text:
<user_query>
Search this workspace for references to `fuyao`, `deploy-fuyao`, `/deploy-fuyao`, and `fuyao_deploy.sh`. Summarize candidate files with likely command entry points and whether they are symlinks or wrappers.
</user_query>

yes. I ran the workspace search and can confirm the deploy-related command entry points and whether they are wrappers/symlinks.

- Exact query results:
  - `deploy-fuyao`: no matches.
  - `/deploy-fuyao`: no matches.
  - `fuyao_deploy.sh`: appears as the command target in docs at `humanoid-gym/humanoid/algo/iron_turbo/doc/migration.md:58` and `humanoid-gym/humanoid/algo/iron_turbo/README.md:59,144`.
  - Broad `fuyao` references are widespread, but most are SDK imports/telemetry (`humanoid-gym/scripts`, `humanoid-gym/humanoid`, `humanoid-gym/humanoid/utils`, etc.) and not direct deploy entry scripts.

- Command-entry candidate files (most likely entry points first):

| File | Why it is a command entry candidate | Wrapper / Worker | Symlink |
|---|---|---|---|
| `humanoid-gym/scripts/fuyao_deploy.sh` | Parses CLI options, does validation/branch checks, then runs `fuyao deploy` and invokes `humanoid-gym/scripts/fuyao_train.sh` (`humanoid-gym/scripts/fuyao_deploy.sh:251-260`). | Wrapper | Regular file |
| `legged_gym_ws/scripts/fuyao_deploy.sh` | Thin wrapper that directly executes `fuyao deploy` and passes execution to `legged_gym_ws/scripts/fuyao_train.sh` (`legged_gym_ws/scripts/fuyao_deploy.sh:19`). | Wrapper | Regular file |
| `docker/isaacgym/build_fuyao.sh` | CLI entry for image build via `fuyao docker` (`docker/isaacgym/build_fuyao.sh:5`). | Wrapper | Regular file |
| `humanoid-gym/scripts/auto_sync_local_tfevents.sh` | Contains a direct `fuyao copy` command (`humanoid-gym/scripts/auto_sync_local_tfevents.sh:22`) and is likely intended as a manually run ops helper. | Wrapper-style helper | Regular file |
| `humanoid-gym/scripts/convert_fuyao_history.py` | Wraps `fuyao history` execution into a CLI utility (`humanoid-gym/scripts/convert_fuyao_history.py:42`). | Wrapper-style helper | Regular file |
| `humanoid-gym/scripts/fuyao_train.sh` | Referenced as payload script for deploy (`humanoid-gym/scripts/fuyao_deploy.sh:260`) and targeted as run entry inside Fuyao; note it is more of a worker script than an orchestrator (`humanoid-gym/scripts/fuyao_train.sh:3`). | Worker (not orchestrator) | Regular file |
| `legged_gym_ws/scripts/fuyao_train.sh` | Similar worker role, invoked by `legged_gym_ws/scripts/fuyao_deploy.sh`. | Worker (not orchestrator) | Regular file |

- Symlink check:
  - I checked filesystem metadata for these candidates (`test -L`/path inspection); all are regular files, not symlinks.

If you want, I can also produce a second-pass list of every non-entrypoint `fuyao` reference grouped by project area (training, eval, telemetry, infra) with line numbers.
done
